summary: Draft-only generation controls rendered correctly on a new persona configuration, including per-axis selectors, live counts, cost estimates, and the empty state before any run.

assertions.details: The draft config detail page showed the `Generate Synthetic Users` controls.
evidence: Draft config `ut-panel-87ed9824 config` showed `Generate Synthetic Users` on `/persona-configs/p17b2ypgbg1gegch6erw76fz4983y893`.

assertions.details: Each axis rendered a 3/5/7 level selector and defaulted to 3 levels.
evidence: The page text showed `Digital confidence ... 3 levels` and `Support needs ... 3 levels` before any changes.
Opening the selector exposed `3 levels`, `5 levels`, and `7 levels` options.

assertions.details: The live count preview updated immediately when one axis changed from 3 to 5 levels.
evidence: Default preview: `2 axes x 3 levels = 9 synthetic users`.
After changing Support needs to 5 levels: `2 axes x mixed levels (3 · 5) = 15 synthetic users`.

assertions.details: The draft config showed a token and USD estimate before any generation started.
Before any generation run, the section showed an instructional empty state.
evidence: The page text included `No generated synthetic users yet. Configure per-axis granularity, confirm the estimate, and run generation to build a reviewable cohort.`
